data.prometheus.yml:
global:
  scrape_interval: 15s
  evaluation_interval: 15s
  external_labels:
    cluster: 'flowmaster-dev'
    environment: 'development'

rule_files:
  - /etc/prometheus/rules/*.yml

scrape_configs:
  # Prometheus self-monitoring
  - job_name: 'prometheus'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['localhost:9090']

  # Kubernetes pods
  - job_name: 'kubernetes-pods'
    kubernetes_sd_configs:
      - role: pod
    relabel_configs:
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_annotation_prometheus_io_scrape]
        action: keep
        regex: true
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_annotation_prometheus_io_path]
        action: replace
        target_label: __metrics_path__
        regex: (.+)
      - source_labels: [__address__, __meta_kubernetes_pod_annotation_prometheus_io_port]
        action: replace
        regex: ([^:]+)(?::\d+)?;(\d+)
        replacement: $1:$2
        target_label: __address__
      - action: labelmap
        regex: __meta_kubernetes_pod_label_(.+)
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_namespace]
        action: replace
        target_label: kubernetes_namespace
      - source_labels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_name]
        action: replace
        target_label: kubernetes_pod_name

  # Node Exporter - Server host metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network)
  - job_name: 'node-exporter'
    scrape_interval: 30s
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['65.21.52.58:9100']
        labels:
          server: 'dev-02'
          location: 'helsinki'
      - targets: ['65.21.52.58:9101']
        labels:
          server: 'dev-01'
          location: 'helsinki'

  # Actual FlowMaster services (using correct service names)
  # Core services
  - job_name: 'flowmaster-core'
    static_configs:
      - targets:
        - 'api-gateway:9000'
        - 'service-registry:8001'
        - 'event-bus:9013'
        - 'auth-service:9001'
        - 'execution-engine:9005'
        - 'process-design:9003'
        - 'business-rules-engine:9011'
        - 'ai-agent:9006'

  # Business services
  - job_name: 'flowmaster-business'
    static_configs:
      - targets:
        - 'data-intelligence:9004'
        - 'document-intelligence:9002'
        - 'knowledge-hub:9017'
        - 'bac-marketplace:9015'
        - 'human-task:9006'
        - 'prompt-engineering:9018'
        - 'external-integration:9016'
        - 'legal-entity-service:8014'

  # Supporting services
  - job_name: 'flowmaster-supporting'
    static_configs:
      - targets:
        - 'audit-compliance:9019'
        - 'scheduling:9008'
        - 'notification:8021'
        - 'communication:9020'
        - 'websocket-gateway:9010'
        - 'agent-service:9006'
        - 'dxg-service:8000'
        - 'encryption-service:8030'
        - 'kms-service:9025'
        - 'settings-service:8031'
        - 'credential-vault:8000'
        - 'process-manager:8002'
        - 'backend-service:8002'
        - 'context-module:9020'
        - 'llm-integration-service:9010'
        - 'role-management:9012'
        - 'sdx:9027'
        - 'sdx-stream:8600'
        - 'log-viewer:3099'

  # Frontend services
  - job_name: 'flowmaster-frontend'
    static_configs:
      - targets:
        - 'frontend-nextjs:3000'
        - 'manager-frontend:3000'
        - 'engage-frontend:3000'
        - 'engage-mcp-server:3001'
        - 'engage-preferences:3002'
        - 'engage-collaboration:8021'
        - 'api-docs:8040'
        - 'audit-service:8041'
